Company profile

Committed to make people's Global Career

HiCare Services Ltd. is a modern, efficient overseas recruiting agency in Bangladesh — connecting ethical employers with skilled, semi-skilled, and unskilled manpower across the GCC, Malaysia, and Singapore.

Contact usOur services
RL-2234Recruiting license
BAIRAMember agency
2022Incorporated
Vision

Our vision

Our goal is to facilitate individuals in finding suitable careers in the highly competitive global market and providing services that empower our clients to succeed in the evolving landscape of employment
Chairman

Message from the Chairman

Ashraf Khan on HiCare's network, values, and commitment to overseas partners.

Ashraf Khan

Chairman

Dear esteemed partners and associates, greetings from HiCare Services Ltd. It brings me great pleasure to introduce HiCare Services Ltd., a trustworthy and dependable name in the field of overseas employment for manpower and human resources. Our company operates a highly efficient network throughout Bangladesh and is fully equipped to recruit personnel who meet the requirements of our esteemed overseas employers.

Bangladesh is home to a surplus of talented, hardworking individuals who are eager to export their skills and contribute to economies around the world. Our workforce is known for dedication, loyalty, and honesty — qualities that employers value in every sector.

HiCare Services Ltd. is equipped to provide skilled, semi-skilled, and unskilled manpower swiftly and professionally, and we invite potential clients to establish a long-term business relationship with us. We are committed to excellence, top-notch service, and a professional attitude as we work toward becoming a leading market player in the Middle East and other developed countries.

— Ashraf Khan, Chairman

Managing Director

Message from the Managing Director

S. N. Manzur Murshed (Mahbub) on capability, markets, and how we work with employers.

S. N. Manzur Murshed (Mahbub)

Managing Director

Dear valued partners and associates, greetings from HiCare Services Ltd. I am pleased to introduce our agency as a modern, efficient, and leading overseas recruiting agency in Bangladesh. Our unwavering commitment to high-quality, professional services has earned us reliability, trustworthiness, and global appreciation.

Bangladesh, with its dense population, presents a unique opportunity to help develop the economic structures of countries suffering from a shortage of skilled manpower. We believe that “people are resources” and have devoted ourselves to discovering the best candidates and instilling a sense of responsibility in them. Our technical training and testing center ensures that we maintain an unparalleled database of potential employees with exceptional technical skills who are highly sought after in the market.

In today’s highly competitive job market, finding the right candidate for a vacancy can be challenging. Without the appropriate expertise, scouting for the ideal candidate can waste significant time and money. If you face this dilemma, consider delegating the task to us. We have the knowledge and experience to mobilize the right personnel for your company at a reasonable cost and in accordance with your requirements.

I hope this profile gives you a better understanding of our company and the services we offer.

— S. N. Manzur Murshed (Mahbub), Managing Director

Overview

HiCare Services Ltd.

HiCare Services Ltd. is a reputable agency in Bangladesh that has been approved by the government as a manpower recruiting agency with license No. RL-2234. The agency is registered under the Ministry of Expatriates Welfare & Overseas Employment and has become a foremost conglomerate in Bangladesh. HiCare Services Ltd. is also a member of the Bangladesh Association of International Recruiting Agencies (BAIRA).

The company recognizes the need for a professionally managed recruitment agency to connect job opportunities with job seekers, which is why HiCare Services Ltd. was established. Our goal is to provide competitive, efficient, and reliable human resource solutions to become a leading provider in this industry — a position reflected in our standing today.

Training & social responsibility

As a socially responsible company, HiCare Services Ltd. believes in strengthening the diversity of our communities and creating opportunities for all people to participate in the workforce. The company focuses on developing sustainable solutions for the long term and on bridging the gap between employers and individuals. By identifying skills gaps and helping people engage with the workforce, we connect job seekers with opportunities that benefit both parties.

To ensure that quality human resources are sourced for our valued partners, HiCare Services Ltd. has developed its own training center. Candidates seeking overseas employment may face challenges adjusting to new work environments, language, culture, and norms — so HiCare Training Institute offers training and induction courses for both overseas employment seekers and employers. Our systems, programs, and policies are designed to make employment a viable option for those who need it. We focus on people’s abilities, not their disabilities, and do not discriminate against anyone.

At a glance

LicenseRL-2234
IncorporationC-181931/2022
22 June 2022, Dhaka
MembershipBangladesh Association of International Recruiting Agencies (BAIRA)
MinistryMinistry of Expatriates' Welfare & Overseas Employment

Context

A brief overview of Bangladesh

Bangladesh offers scale, skills, and infrastructure momentum that support sustainable overseas employment partnerships.

  • Home to the world’s largest delta and the seventh-largest human-made reservoir.
  • Second-largest pool of human resources in the world.
  • Second-largest contributor of United Nations peacekeeping troops.
  • Bangladeshi engineers work for global MNCs; doctors practice medicine worldwide.
  • One of the fastest-growing economies, with average GDP growth around 6–7% over the last decade.
  • Strong progress in ready-made garments, agriculture, fisheries, IT, and human resources export.
  • Poverty rate reduced from 41.5% (2005) to 24.3% (2016) per World Bank data.
  • Major infrastructure: Padma Bridge, MRT Metrorail, Dhaka Airport 3rd Terminal, Cox’s Bazar Airport upgrade.
  • A growing middle class drives demand for consumer goods, housing, education, and healthcare.
  • Special Economic Zones (SEZs) for textiles, electronics, and pharmaceuticals.
  • Government reforms to simplify regulations and attract foreign investment.
  • Strategic location between South and Southeast Asia for trade with neighboring countries.
Talent pipeline

Manpower potentials

Educational and training capacity supporting recruitment across major disciplines (company profile tables).

Universities, engineering & tourism

InstitutionNo. of institutionsFaculties
University (General)Public: 53 · Private: 82Arts, Biological Science, Business Studies, Earth & Environment Sciences, Engineering & Technology, Fine Arts, Law, Pharmacy, Science, Social Sciences, Life & Earth Science, Agriculture & Medicine.
Engineering UniversityPublic: 8 · Private: 5Engineering, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical & Electronic, Architecture & Planning, Electronic & Telecom, Water Resources & Development.
Agriculture University12Veterinary Science, Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Agricultural Economics & Rural Sociology, Agricultural Engineering & Technology, Fisheries, Agribusiness Management, Soil Science, Farm Mechanics, Agricultural Extension & Information System, Horticulture & Post Harvest Technology.
TourismNHTTI, ATTI, etc.: 68Ticketing & Reservation, Tour Guide, Tourism & Hospitality Management, Front Office, Food & Beverages, Cook, Housekeeping.

Medical University5Covering major disciplines

Art College8Fine Arts, Commercial Arts, Graphic Design, Oriental Arts, Sculpture, Ceramics.

Polytechnic Institute156Engineering, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical & Electronic, Architecture & Planning, Electronic & Telecommunication, Water Resources & Development.

Why HiCare

Why choose HiCare?

HiCare provides recruitment and staffing for skilled, semi-skilled, and unskilled workers across single or multi-location national operations.

01

Specialized divisions

Industry-specific recruiters understand unique skill requirements and know where to find the best talent.

02

Quick response time

We maintain a database of qualified candidates and provide real-time updates on medical fitness, flights, and deployment schedules.

03

Carefully screened candidates

Comprehensive recruiting, screening, and testing so candidates fit the positions you need.

Our recruitment cycle: client requirement analysis → sourcing → screening → skill/trade test → selection.

Client requirement analysisSourcingScreeningSkill / trade testSelection

Our services

Manpower, consultancy & advisory

HiCare Services Ltd. applies deep expertise in professional recruitment and an understanding of local and international manpower processes to deliver HR services and recruitment solutions. Our services are built on global competencies and an extensive database for international placements across industries.

We specialize in placing job seekers in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Malaysia, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Qatar, and Singapore. We focus on finding quality talent from overseas, particularly from Bangladesh, a prime location for recruitment.

Our work includes assistance with overseas immigration, guidance on international work permit legislation, and immigration advice for prospective and current clients.

Core markets

Kingdom of Saudi ArabiaMalaysiaUnited Arab EmiratesKuwaitQatarSingapore

Employment support

Our preference is for the employer or their authorized representative to conduct oral or practical tests for applicant selection. When we are tasked with selection and testing, a team of experts supports technical and professional categories under the supervision of our executives, including accommodation, transport, and logistics for testing.

Visa support

We offer visa services for employment visas, visit visas, and work permits. Our focus is fast, dependable processing — with experience handling thousands of travel documents, we work to complete visas quickly, accurately, and professionally.

Ticketing support

We provide tickets for recruits through our IATA-approved travel arrangement, with services licensed and approved by the government to facilitate required ticketing.

Employer guide

Recruitment procedure

Firstly, the employer and HiCare Services Ltd. should execute an agency agreement that states the terms and conditions regarding the demand and supply of manpower from Bangladesh. Both parties must sign to accept the terms upon which the demand will be executed.

Understanding employer needs

We start by understanding the employer’s needs. We study client requirements and discuss details with your representative for a complete picture. We work closely with clients to build long-term relationships, then collect the documents outlined in your mandate.

Employer documentation

Power of Attorney

The employer issues a power of attorney appointing HiCare Services Ltd. as attorney and agent in Bangladesh to handle affairs with the Bangladesh Government for recruitment on the employer’s behalf.

Demand letter

The employer issues a formal demand letter specifying job categories, numbers, monthly salary, duty hours, contract duration, and amenities such as food, medical care, transport, air passage, accommodation, and other benefits.

Visa documents

The employer provides visa documents that allow the employing country to recruit from Bangladesh. Documents must be original where required, authenticated, and acceptable to the respective embassy.

Company registration

A photocopy of company registration is necessary for some markets (e.g. KSA) as per current rules.

Counselor letter

Where required (e.g. KSA), a letter addressed to the Consular General allowing recruitment from Bangladesh per the demand letter against the stated visa number.

Employment agreement

Standard employment contracts between employer and employee as used in your jurisdiction.

Agency agreement

Employer and HiCare Services Ltd. sign an agency agreement governing both parties. Power of Attorney and Demand Letter should be original, sealed and signed by the sponsor or authorized person, and attested by Chamber of Commerce and Ministry of Foreign Affairs where applicable.

Contact

Reach HiCare Services Ltd.

Call, email, or send a message — we will respond with next steps for your demand letter and recruitment plan.
